options.message:
We heard that you lost your password. Sorry about that!

But don’t worry! You can use the following link to reset your password:

<%= URL %>?code=<%= TOKEN %>

Thanks.

Hello,

Thank you for registering on the Kenya Drylands Investment Hub (KDIH).

To complete your registration and activate your account, please confirm your email address by clicking the link below:

Confirm your email address:

<%= URL %>?confirmation=<%= CODE %>

This step is required before you can access the platform.

If you did not create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

Best regards,
Kenya Drylands Investment Hub Team
